summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 8 new features: (1) QR code generator for countdown page, (2) Promo codes in payment flow, (3) Photo upload with circular crop, (4) Notification system, (5) Updated admin tips. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working via Playwright UI testing.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/countdown/EULF18/qr - returns 200 with image/png content type (PNG magic bytes verified)
Backend: GET /api/countdown/INVALIDCODE/qr - returns 404 for non-existent event
Backend: GET /api/countdown/EULF18 - returns event_code field correctly
Backend: POST /api/promo/validate with LOVE2026 - returns valid=true, discount_percent=50, final_price=25.0
Backend: POST /api/promo/validate with WEDDING - returns valid=true, discount_percent=25, final_price=37.49
Backend: POST /api/promo/validate with FREEAISLE - returns valid=true, discount_percent=100, final_price=0
Backend: POST /api/promo/validate with INVALID - returns 404
Backend: POST /api/payments/checkout with promo_code=FREEAISLE (for new host) - returns paid_free=true
Backend: POST /api/photos/upload - returns photo_url and file_id
Backend: GET /api/photos/{file_id} - serves uploaded photo as image
Backend: GET /api/notifications - returns notifications array and unread_count
Frontend: Countdown page /countdown/EULF18 shows QR code image (data-testid=qr-code-img) with correct src
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows promo code input (data-testid=promo-input) and Apply button
Frontend: Admin dashboard promo code validation - LOVE2026 shows '50% off' and '$25' final price
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows 'Download QR code for invitations' link (data-testid=download-qr-btn)
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows 'Copy shareable countdown link' button
Frontend: Profile setup page shows photo upload with camera icon and circular display
Frontend: Discover page shows notification Bell icon in header
Frontend: Discover page shows live stats bar with guests/matches/today counts
Frontend: Admin dashboard tips updated with QR code and Bouquet Toss instructions
seed_data_creation: Created new test hosts during testing (testpromohost_* accounts)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 tested: (1) QR code endpoint GET /api/countdown/{code}/qr generates PNG QR code - PUBLIC endpoint, no auth. (2) Promo codes LOVE2026/WEDDING/FREEAISLE validated via POST /api/promo/validate - requires auth. FREEAISLE with checkout returns paid_free=true. (3) Photo upload POST /api/photos/upload crops to circle, stores in object storage, served at GET /api/photos/{file_id} - PUBLIC serve. (4) Notifications at GET /api/notifications. (5) Admin dashboard shows QR download link and updated tips. All features working correctly.
